query_text: How does the automated invoice reconciliation process work for monthly billing cycles?
reference_answer: The automated invoice reconciliation process runs at the end of each month. The system fetches open invoices, matches them against payment records using the invoice number as a key, and marks reconciled items automatically. Unmatched items are flagged for manual review.
relevant_spans: The automated reconciliation job executes every month-end. It queries all open invoices and attempts to match each one against incoming payment entries using the invoice reference number. Successfully matched pairs are marked as reconciled and archived.
Unmatched invoices after the reconciliation run are moved to the manual review queue, where an operator can resolve discrepancies or assign partial payments.

query_text: How can I configure the custom export format for the payroll module?
reference_answer: The custom payroll export format is configured by defining an XML template in the Payroll > Export > Templates menu. Each field in the template maps to a payroll column. The delimiter and encoding are set in the template header section.
relevant_spans: To configure a custom export format for payroll, navigate to Payroll > Export > Templates. Create a new template and define the field mappings using the drag-and-drop editor. The XML header section controls the output delimiter, file encoding (UTF-8 recommended) and line terminator.
Once saved, the template appears in the Payroll > Monthly Run > Export dropdown. Select it before triggering the export job. The resulting file is placed in the configured output folder.
